description: Resource Type definition for AWS::Interconnect::Connection. Creates a managed network connection between AWS and a partner cloud service provider.

Tag.description: A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

Key.description: The key name of the tag. You can specify a value that is 1 to 128 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.
Key.markdownDescription:
The key name of the tag. You can specify a value that is 1 to 128 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.description: The value for the tag. You can specify a value that is 0 to 256 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.
Value.markdownDescription:
The value for the tag. You can specify a value that is 0 to 256 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.markdownDescription:
A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

AttachPoint.description: The logical attachment point in your AWS network where the managed connection will be connected.

DirectConnectGateway.description: The ID of the Direct Connect Gateway to attach to.
DirectConnectGateway.markdownDescription:
The ID of the Direct Connect Gateway to attach to.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9a-fA-F]{8}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption

Arn.description: The ARN of the resource to attach to.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the resource to attach to.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

AttachPoint.markdownDescription:
The logical attachment point in your AWS network where the managed connection will be connected.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

CloudServiceProvider.description: The name of the cloud service provider.
CloudServiceProvider.markdownDescription:
The name of the cloud service provider.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 32  
Update requires: No interruption

LastMileProvider.description: The name of the last mile provider.
LastMileProvider.markdownDescription:
The name of the last mile provider.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 32  
Update requires: No interruption

Provider.markdownDescription:
The partner cloud service provider.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

ConnectionId.description: The unique identifier for the connection.
ConnectionId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier for the connection.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^mcc-[a-z0-9]{8}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connection.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connection.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[a-z-]*:interconnect:[^:]+:[0-9]{12}:connection/mcc-[a-z0-9]{8}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Description.markdownDescription:
A description of the connection.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[-a-zA-Z0-9_ ]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

Bandwidth.description: The bandwidth of the connection (e.g., 50Mbps, 1Gbps). Required when creating a connection through AWS.
Bandwidth.markdownDescription:
The bandwidth of the connection (e.g., 50Mbps, 1Gbps). Required when creating a connection through AWS.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^\d+[MG]bps$  
Update requires: No interruption

AttachPoint.description: The logical attachment point in your AWS network where the managed connection will be connected.
AttachPoint.markdownDescription:
The logical attachment point in your AWS network where the managed connection will be connected.

---

Required: Yes  
Type:   
Update requires: Replacement

EnvironmentId.description: The ID of the environment for the connection. Required when creating a connection through AWS. Mutually exclusive with ActivationKey.
EnvironmentId.markdownDescription:
The ID of the environment for the connection. Required when creating a connection through AWS. Mutually exclusive with ActivationKey.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 32  
Update requires: Replacement

RemoteOwnerAccount.description: Deprecated. Use RemoteAccount instead. The account ID of the remote owner. Required when creating a connection through AWS.
RemoteOwnerAccount.markdownDescription:
Deprecated. Use RemoteAccount instead. The account ID of the remote owner. Required when creating a connection through AWS.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[-a-zA-Z0-9_@\.]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

RemoteAccount.description: The remote account identifier for the connection. Required when creating a connection through AWS. Replaces RemoteOwnerAccount.

Identifier.description: The identifier of the remote account.
Identifier.markdownDescription:
The identifier of the remote account.

---

Required: Yes

Update requires: No interruption

RemoteAccount.markdownDescription:
